productDisplayName: Nike Men White Air Visi Pro Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteA low profile Sports shoe, the nike Air Visi Pro II is engineered with lightweight technology to offer a cushioned and comfortable ride. Pair this with jeans and tees to get that casually stylish look when not on the run.Product DetailsLightweight synthetic upper with perforations for maximum breathability, comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised Fit with a cushioned tongue for maximum comfort Nike swoosh on lateral ankle for support and style with a padded and meshed sockliner for comfortable in-step TPU midfoot saddle for lightweight support and comfortPlush phylon midsole for superior underfoot cushioning, offering a smooth ride Cushioned footbed for shock absorption and impact protectionWaffle and herringbone pattern on the outsole to provide greater grip and traction Pivot point on big toe mound for easy turning of the footNike Air technology to provide ample cushioning by evenly spreading out shock across the forefoot, enhancing propulsion Impact guidance system along the centre of the foot length for better traction and propulsion Forefoot outsole embedded onto upper as a toe guard to enhance durability and protect the toesMaterial and CareSynthetic, nubuckUse a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
